title: Nevlers 18 PK 8 oz Glass Bottles with Lids | Leakproof Cobalt Blue Glass Bottle | Small Glass Bottles for Vanilla Extract Homemade, Medicine Bottles, Extract Bottles, & Apothecary Bottles with Caps
description:
About this item
Timeless Elegance: These blue bottles are the epitome of quality. With leakproof lids and sleek sapphire glass, this blue boston round glass bottle set seamlessly blends functionality and elegance. The alluring cobalt blue hue of the 8 oz bottles with caps not only radiates elegance but also protects your contents from any harmful UV rays. Embrace the sophistication of Nevlers 8 oz blue glass bottles for an unmatched bottling experience.
An Endless Creative Canvas: Unleash your creativity w/ these multi-use colored glass bottles . Crafted to store your preferred cosmetics, oils, or DIY home creations, the uses for this 8oz glass bottles with lids set are endless! These blue bottles are your blank canvas, capable of bottling beard or hair oil, as a potion bottle , or perfumes so you can store your favorite cosmetic products or take them on the go. Start your creative journey with Nevlers glass small bottles set!
Total Convience Unwrapped: Dive into a realm of absolute convenience with this glass bottle with lid set. The 18 bottle collection of blue 8 oz bottles with lids also includes 18 covers, a user-friendly funnel, a handy brush, a versatile white chalk marker, & a set of 24 black chalkboard labels. These versatile tincture bottles are easy to customize and seamless to organize. Elevate your bottling experience – opt for Nevlers glass shot bottles with caps !
Space-Smart Solution: Whether you're travelling or simply saving space at home, our small glass bottle are the ideal solution. Designed to harmonize with your lifestyle, they seamlessly slip into your travel bag, ensuring you're well-prepared wherever you go. At home, your blue small bottles snugly nestle into your kitchen cabinet, preserving your valuable space. Embrace the art of space optimization & simplify your life with these sleek little glass bottles .
Our Unwavering Commitment to your Satisfaction: Your satisfaction is our top priority. That is why we wholeheartedly back our Nevlers 8 ounce glass bottles with lids with a 1-Year Warranty. Securely safeguard your precious oils or homemade vanilla extract bottles with complete peace of mind, knowing that we're here to resolve any and all of your concerns and keep you content with our high-quality products. Entrust your storage needs to the experts – your satisfaction is our guarantee!
reviews_5s: I love these! Just bought my second dozen -- I use them to bottle my homemade extracts. I'd check them out right away, though, as I occasionally got a cap that didn't tighten properly.Bought these to make homemade bourbon vanilla extract. They were PERFECT and really made a beautiful gift. They are glass and definitely breakable (not that I got any that were). But they are worth the buy if you are going to use them for crafting purposes.Great for my lavender products.I loved the size and the deep rich color. And they are completely leak proof!!! Good quality.One of the bottles was broken on arrival. I figured it was broken in transit because the pieces were in the box. Not sure exactly how it broke but I am not returning the order cuz I want to complete my vanilla bottling. I give them out as gifts throughout the year they are a good size and leak proof.I made homemade vanilla extract with coconut rum to give out as Christmas gifts last year and the one that I made for myself is still doing well! The bottle has a great seal and a nice tint and I really liked that it came with a brush to clean them out! I used a couple that I had leftover to put elderberry syrup in about a month ago and they were still great! I do wish that the included funnel opening was a little bit larger though. Using the funnel was a little tricky as you can only do a thin stream of liquid and have to be very careful or it overflows, so I would recommend using a different tool for actually filling them.Planning on using these for vanilla extract. Packaged to prevent breakage during transport. Delivered on time. Works for me.So far so good! Made my homemade vanilla extract in them. Don’t leak and easy to use!! Love 💕 the color!!!These bottles are exactly what they say. Perfect for my 8 oz jars for making pure vanilla extract. These are the only bottles I will use.Purchased these to fill with vanilla extract for gifts. Perfect size and the cobalt blue color is gorgeous. Received without the labels and contacted the seller and they mailed them to me. Great customer service.
reviews_1s: Missing half the lids. Now I can’t even use the other half of the bottlesI revived 6 clear plastic bottles. Not at all what was pictured. Could have been a switch, but I wouldn’t purchase because it is not as pictured.Incorrect lids were received with product
